title: Iran strikes spark accusations of bad-faith diplomatic negotiations
summary_full: U.S. officials said they were negotiating with Iran in good faith, even if hours later they joined Israeli military strikes that targeted the Iranian government.
summary_public: U.S. officials said they were negotiating with Iran in good faith, even if hours later they joined Israeli military strikes that targeted the Iranian government.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israeli military strikes that targeted the Iranian government
